# avatar — More _(HTML/CSS)_

```css
@forward '@lucca-front/scss/src/components/user';
@forward '@lucca-front/scss/src/components/avatar';
```

```html
<ul class="avatarWrapper">
	<li class="avatarWrapper-item" translate="no">
```
